channel.title: TGaceAllStories
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from TGaceAllStories, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Don’t make the same mistake I did when I tried to save $200 on my last flight
item.description: I had to change my travel plans at the last minute — and I ended up losing money because of this relatable booking practice

item.title: I’m trying to fix my relationship with my stepdaughter. Should my husband and I tell her how we have divided our assets?
item.description: “We bought a house outright for $500,000. We each contributed $250,000.”

item.title: More than 1 million homeowners are underwater on their mortgage — a 7-year high. Here’s what experts advise they do.
item.description: About 1.1 million homeowners were underwater on their mortgages at the end of last year as home prices stalled, signaling a deepening crisis within th...

item.title: CVS Health’s stock gains 3% as execs reassure investors about year ahead
item.description: The changes come as the wider retail-pharmacy market has been upended in recent years.

item.title: What if bitcoin prices fall to $8,000? Michael Saylor says Strategy still won’t sell.
item.description: Strategy Executive Chair Michael Saylor attempted on Tuesday to dismiss “unfounded” fears that the recent tumble in bitcoin prices would force the com...

item.title: How to play the rebound of this 'Mag 7' stock with options
item.description: As the broader markets shake off the early February rout, there are opportunities for mean reversion traders.

item.title: Tuesday's big stock stories: What’s likely to move the market in the next trading session
item.description: Traders bought up tech shares Monday, lifting the S&P 500 for back-to-back gains. The Dow Industrials also hit fresh intraday and closing records.

item.title: Michael Saylor downplays Strategy credit risk as bitcoin tumbles: 'We'll refinance the debt'
item.description: Strategy plans to continue refinancing its debt and buying bitcoin, even as the token tumbles, CEO Michael Saylor said Tuesday on CNBC's "Squawk Box."

item.title: Daiwa upgrades Palantir on AI demand, strong commercial revenue guidance
item.description: Daiwa's $180 price target implies that shares of Palantir could rally 26% from here.

item.title: Gordon Haskett upgrades Booking Holdings ahead of earnings, calls AI fears overblown
item.description: Gordon Haskett's $5,440 price target implies that shares of Booking Holdings could surge 28% from here.

item.title: Valaris Stock Soars on $5.8B Transocean Acquisition
item.description: Valaris (VAL) shares close up 34.31% on news of a $5.8 billion all-stock acquisition by Transocean (RIG), creating a major offshore drilling powerhous...

item.title: Silicon Labs Soars on Texas Instruments Buyout Deal
item.description: Listen up, folks! If you’re scanning the markets today, you’ve got to see what’s happening with Silicon Labs (SLAB). As of this writing, shares have e...

item.title: Biotech Stocks Skyrocket on Game-Changing News
item.description: Discover why biotech stocks like CRVS and RAPT are surging today on trial breakthroughs and deals. Learn trading insights and risks in this exciting m...

item.title: SelectQuote Surges 23% on $415M Credit Facility News
item.description: SelectQuote (SLQT) stock jumped 23% on January 12, 2026 after securing a $415M credit facility. Dive into the details, risks, benefits, and how simila...

item.title: Monte Rosa Therapeutics (GLUE) Soars on Promising Inflammation Drug Data
item.description: Monte Rosa Therapeutics (GLUE) stock surges over 42% on positive Phase 1 data for MRT-8102, showing profound reductions in inflammation marker hsCRP. ...
